name: Shanghai Haohai Biol.Te.Co.LtdR
summary: Shanghai Haohai Biological Technology Co., Ltd. is a Chinese company specializing in the research, development, manufacturing, and sales of medical devices and biomaterials. The company's product portfolio includes ophthalmic viscoelastic devices, medical sodium hyaluronate products, and other surgical products. Shanghai Haohai Biological Technology is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
